subject: Re: Jeffrey Epstein

subject: Re: Jeffrey Epstein
body:
Joi, I am so very sorry but Jeffrey is canceling his trip to Vancouver! It is very sudden and he is sorry, but he is flying to Washington, DC now.

I am sure he will be in touch with you...

Please accept our apologies..

Lesley

--
